flow: Outer Ring Road -> Southgate Offramp -> Main Parking/Checkpoint -> Walk-only Drip Saints Connector -> Drip Saints territory
gameplay_rules: Outer road and Southgate offramp are vehicle/van areas.
Southgate main parking/checkpoint allows vehicle access into both parking lots.
Southgate to Drip Saints connector is walk-only.
Use invisible Red Concord detection cones later in Phaser.
Use road override rectangles in Phaser if van catches on thin collision artifacts.
Door, gate, and barrier panels that open/close should be separate interactive assets.

layer_conventions.road_decals_underlay: painted road decals under sprites when present
layer_conventions.foreground_overlay: decorative structures, walls, poles, wires, signs, banners, props
